description.ko: 고대의 난파선과 활기찬 생물 발광 생명체들이 만나 잊혀지지 않을 만큼 아름다운 수중 안식처를 만들어내는 고요하고 어두운 바다 깊은 곳의 탐험입니다.
description.en: An exploration of the silent, dark depths of the ocean where ancient shipwrecks meet vibrant bioluminescent life forms, creating a hauntingly beautiful underwater sanctuary.

prompt: Cinematic wide shot of the deep ocean abyss, bioluminescent coral reefs glowing in neon blue and purple, a colossal mysterious ship wreck resting on the dark sandy floor, ethereal deep-sea jellyfish floating gracefully, volumetric lighting filtering through the dark water, ultra-detailed, 8k, photorealistic, mystical atmosphere.
